LAW AND MOTION 302, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - NO APPEARANCE. DEMURRER OVERRULED 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION AND SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE OF IMPLIED WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE OVERRULED. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION REAL PROPERTY SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE PER SE OVERRULED. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. 8TH, 9TH, 10TH CAUSES OF ACTION OVERRULED. 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO SPECIFY STATUTE (1951.3-WRONG). 12TH, 13TH, 14TH, 15TH, 16TH, 17TH, 18TH, 19TH, 20TH, AND 21ST CAUSES OF ACTION OVERRULED. MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION ATTORNEY'S FEES DENIED. GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES DENIED. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION PUNITIVES DENIED, ATTORNEY FEES DENIED. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE - MOOT. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE PER SE DENIED. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION - MOOT. 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION TREBLE DAMAGES, PUNITIVES - DENIED. 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION PUNITIVES DENIED. 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION - MOOT. 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION GRANTED. 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION 17200 DAMAGES GRANTED. 15TH CAUSE OF ACTION PUNITIVES DENIED. 16TH, 17TH, AND 18TH CAUSES OF ACTION PUNITIVES DENIED. 19TH, 2OTH, AND 21ST CAUSES OF ACTION DENIED.
